---
title: "Introduction to Shiny"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/02-building_blocks.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/02-building_blocks.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

`code/demos/app-01-intro.py`

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]
#| viewerHeight: 520

{{< include /../code/demos/app-01-intro.py >}}
```

:::
